name: linkedin-post-writer
description: Convert blog posts to native LinkedIn TEXT posts (1100-1300 chars), 2026 algorithm-optimized. 4 skills + 1 agent: brief router, text post writer, validator (Depth Score >=80 gate), and end-to-end orchestrator. 12 text hook formulas, 20-rule anti-slop rubric, link-in-comment discipline. Carousel format short-circuits to status=route_to_carousel_gen — backend dispatches the universal /carousel-gen engine (in ai-image-carousel-prompt-gen plugin) for slide + image-prompt authoring. v0.5.0 BREAKING: /linkedin-carousel skill DELETED (carousel design specs moved to /carousel-gen plugin), refs-linkedin-carousel.md retired, compile-refs.ts produces 3 bundles instead of 4. Pure content generation — emits draft JSON for an admin panel to consume.
